description: Spoked handwheel lying flat on XY plane, centered at origin. Comprises a central hub cylinder with center bore, four rectangular spokes at 90-degree intervals, and an outer ring rim. All components share a common base at Z=0.
components: Hub: solid cylinder, 30mm OD, 12mm tall (Z=0 to Z=12)
Center bore: cylindrical hole, 14mm diameter, through full hub height (Z=0 to Z=12)
Outer rim: hollow ring, 100mm OD / 88mm ID, 8mm tall (Z=0 to Z=8)
Spoke 0deg: rectangular bar aligned along +X axis, 8mm wide (Y), 8mm tall (Z=0 to Z=8), 29mm long (X), centered at X=29.5mm, Y=0
Spoke 90deg: rectangular bar aligned along +Y axis, 8mm wide (X), 8mm tall (Z=0 to Z=8), 29mm long (Y), centered at X=0, Y=29.5mm
Spoke 180deg: rectangular bar aligned along -X axis, 8mm wide (Y), 8mm tall (Z=0 to Z=8), 29mm long (X), centered at X=-29.5mm, Y=0
Spoke 270deg: rectangular bar aligned along -Y axis, 8mm wide (X), 8mm tall (Z=0 to Z=8), 29mm long (Y), centered at X=0, Y=-29.5mm
notes: Construction strategy: (1) Create hub cylinder radius=15, height=12, centered at origin. (2) Subtract center bore cylinder radius=7, height=12. (3) Create rim as outer cylinder radius=50 height=8 minus inner cylinder radius=44 height=8. (4) Create four spokes as rectangular boxes: for X-aligned spokes use Box(length=29, width=8, height=8) centered at (±29.5, 0, 4); for Y-aligned spokes use Box(length=8, width=29, height=8) centered at (0, ±29.5, 4). (5) Union hub + rim + all four spokes, then subtract bore. Spoke length of 29mm exactly bridges from hub outer edge (r=15) to rim inner edge (r=44): 44-15=29mm. Spokes are centered at Z=4 (half of 8mm height) matching rim height. Hub protrudes 4mm above rim/spokes (Z=8 to Z=12). Ensure boolean union is clean with no gap between spoke ends and hub/rim surfaces.
